summary: Uses a complete structure with a below-threshold MOAT score to verify scoring enforcement. [CONFIG]

frontmatter.name: low-moat-review
frontmatter.description: Use when validating that skill designs below the configured MOAT threshold are rejected.

guiding_principle: The MOAT threshold prevents structurally complete but weak skill designs from passing. [DOC]
quality_criteria: The total must equal the component sum. [CODE]
The total must meet the configured minimum. [CONFIG]
A below-threshold score fails even when structure is complete. [CONFIG]
anti_patterns: Accepting a weak score because fields are present.
Using a total that differs from component sum.
Skipping score validation for review fixtures.

edge_cases.case: Total equals component sum but is below threshold.
The fixture is otherwise structurally valid.
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Keep failure focused on score threshold. [CODE]

validation: This fixture must fail on MOAT threshold. [CODE]
risks: If accepted, weak but complete skill designs could pass. [ASSUMPTION]
